query:
SELECT 
  p.projectState, 
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as total_projects,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.contactStatus = 'send_ready' THEN p.id END) as projects_with_send_ready
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId AND c.contactStatus = 'send_ready'
GROUP BY p.projectState 
ORDER BY total_projects DESC;
